name: Halzan leather handbag
description:
Hermès Halzan 31 - Black Clemence with Palladium Hardware - Full Set

✨ Condition & Style

Condition: Pristine/Like New (99% new). This bag has only been unboxed and shows virtually no signs of wear.

Color & Hardware: The most sought-after "Black with Silver (Palladium) Hardware" combination.

The Aesthetic: Sophisticated, understated luxury with a modern edge. A true "dark horse" in the Hermès collection that has become a top-tier favorite for its versatility.

👜 Functionality

Versatile Carrying Options: Can be worn in multiple ways—as a tote, a fold-over clutch, or a crossbody/shoulder bag using the adjustable strap. Perfect for both casual and high-end looks.

🔢 Details & Accessories

Stamp: D Stamp.

Full Set Includes: Original receipt, dust bag, box, and all original accessories.

Retail Value: Currently retailing for $9,250 plus tax.

Value Proposition: Experience the joy of unboxing a brand-new Hermès piece while enjoying significant savings.
